name: get_requests
description: List media requests and their statuses.

filter.description: Filter by status: 'pending', 'approved', 'available', or 'all'. Defaults to 'all'.

media_type.description: Filter by media type: 'movie' or 'tv'. Omit for all types.

take.description: Number of results to return. Defaults to 20.

skip.description: Number of results to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0.
